response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned web and full-stack developer with a solid track record in distributed systems and software craftsmanship, but he critically fails to meet the primary minimum qualification: 8 years of C++ experience. C++ appears only in a 6-month stint at National Instruments and a bachelor's thesis project, and is conspicuously absent from his skills list. His background is overwhelmingly TypeScript/Node.js/web-oriented, with no evidence of cloud compute platform ownership, hardware architecture, or storage systems work at the depth this role requires. While he has held 'Staff' titles and run community workshops, there is no indication of formal technical leadership over cloud or DevOps engineering teams.
strengths: Hands-on distributed systems experience at scale: built low-latency micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby using async I/O and high-performance databases
Consistent software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community mentorship via workshops and refactoring dojos spanning 10+ years
Infrastructure and DevOps exposure: AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments, Docker, GitLab CI — demonstrates awareness of the broader platform engineering space
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months at NI, one thesis project) against an 8-year minimum requirement — C++ does not even appear in the skills section
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture, storage systems, networking infrastructure, or hardware-level systems design at any meaningful depth
No demonstrated formal technical leadership of cloud or DevOps engineering teams; mentorship activities are community/volunteer-level, not organisational
